def negative_python_perf_layer_network_calls_http_session_created_per_call():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_network_calls_http_session_created_per_call"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Network calls. Flag requests.Session or client objects created per call instead of reused per upstream."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
